description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Hyouton)

Rank: 5

Chakra Cost: 7

Learn DC: 19 | Successes: 3

Perform: 7 | Perform DC: 20

Components: C, H, M

You create a swarm of small birds from ice and snow, which will occupy a 5 ft wide, 10 ft long area, and appears within 10 ft of you. Each round, you can have the swarm move as you choose. It has a flight speed of 50 ft, with Perfect maneuverability, and it provokes no attacks of opportunity for moving into, out of, or through threatened areas. If the swarm flies through an area occupied by one or more creatures, those creatures take 2d6 cold and 2d6 slashing damage (Reflex halves).

The swarm can be attacked, but is immune to attacks that target only a single creature. It has 10 HP and a Defense score of 18. It shares your Reflex save bonus, and if you have evasion (or a variation thereof), the swarm also benefits from it. The swarm cannot be flatfooted, is immune to being entangled, stunned, diseased or poisoned, cannot suffer ability damage or ability drain, and is unaffected by any effect requiring a Will or Fortitude save.

If the swarm moves out of the technique's range or is destroyed, the technique ends.
